parameters.query: SELECT json_build_object('orders_target', 42.8, 'sales_ytd', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(SUM((fy_revenue->>'FY26')::numeric),0) FROM gda_active_contracts),1), 'ebit_ytd', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(SUM((fy_revenue->>'FY26')::numeric),0) * 0.172 FROM gda_active_contracts),1), 'funded_backlog', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(funded),0) FROM gda_active_contracts),1), 'total_backlog', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ceiling),0) FROM gda_active_contracts),1), 'pipeline_qualified', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(pipeline_qualified),0) FROM gda_aop_tracker WHERE ou='OU3' AND fiscal_year='FY26'), 'pipeline_weighted', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(pipeline_weighted),0) FROM gda_aop_tracker WHERE ou='OU3' AND fiscal_year='FY26'), 'fy26_annual_target', 42.8, 'source', 'live') as kpi

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_aop_tracker (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ou TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OU3', fiscal_year TEXT NOT NULL, quarter TEXT NOT NULL, revenue_target NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, revenue_actual NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, revenue_forecast NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, ebitda_target_pct NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 0, ebitda_actual_pct NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 0, book_to_bill_target NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 0, book_to_bill_actual NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 0, pipeline_raw NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, pipeline_qualified NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, pipeline_weighted NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, must_win_count INT DEFAULT 0, must_win_value NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, new_biz_bookings NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, recompete_bookings NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0, headcount_target INT DEFAULT 0, headcount_actual INT DEFAULT 0, notes TEXT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(ou, fiscal_year, quarter)); INSERT INTO gda_aop_tracker (ou,fiscal_year,quarter,revenue_target,pipeline_raw,pipeline_qualified,pipeline_weighted,must_win_count,must_win_value) VALUES ('OU3','FY26','Q1',11.2,670,435,177,2,200),('OU3','FY26','Q2',11.2,670,435,177,2,200),('OU3','FY26','Q3',11.2,670,435,177,2,200),('OU3','FY26','Q4',11.2,670,435,177,2,200),('OU3','FY27','Q1',12.55,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY27','Q2',12.55,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY27','Q3',12.55,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY27','Q4',12.55,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY28','Q1',14.05,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY28','Q2',14.05,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY28','Q3',14.05,0,0,0,0,0),('OU3','FY28','Q4',14.05,0,0,0,0,0) ON CONFLICT (ou,fiscal_year,quarter) DO NOTHING; WITH fy AS (SELECT fiscal_year,SUM(revenue_target) t,SUM(revenue_actual) a,SUM(revenue_forecast) f,SUM(new_biz_bookings) nb,SUM(recompete_bookings) rb,MAX(pipeline_raw) pr,MAX(pipeline_qualified) pq,MAX(pipeline_weighted) pw,MAX(must_win_count) mwc,MAX(must_win_value) mwv,MAX(headcount_actual) hc FROM gda_aop_tracker WHERE ou='OU3' GROUP BY fiscal_year) SELECT json_build_object('quarters',(SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(q) ORDER BY q.fiscal_year,q.quarter) FROM gda_aop_tracker q WHERE ou='OU3'),'fy_summary',(SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('fiscal_year',fiscal_year,'annual_target',t,'annual_actual',a,'annual_forecast',f,'pipeline_raw',pr,'pipeline_qualified',pq,'pipeline_weighted',pw,'must_win_count',mwc,'must_win_value',mwv,'new_biz',nb,'recompetes',rb,'headcount',hc,'shipley_5x',t*5,'shipley_3x',t*3,'coverage_ratio',CASE WHEN t>0 THEN ROUND(pw/t,1) ELSE 0 END,'new_biz_gap',ROUND(t*0.12,1)) ORDER BY fiscal_year) FROM fy)) as result;
